stemHtml: The three basic components of the Threat and Error Management (TEM) model are, from the perspective of flight crews, threats, errors and undesired aircraft states. With regard to errors, the TEM model..

options.a: recognizes three types of human errors, namely anticipated, unanticipated and latent errors.
options.b: distinguishes three classes of errors, namely operational, organisational and environmental.
options.c: considers three categories of errors, namely aircraft handling, procedural and communications.
options.d: differentiates between three kinds of errors, namely aircraft handling, navigation and aircraft configuration.
